modules.name: Bitwise
modules.description: Perform bitwise AND, OR, XOR, and NOT operations in Minecraft datapacks. Useful for flags, permissions, and compact data storage.

modules.name: Block
modules.description: Get and set block IDs and states in Minecraft datapacks. Mix block properties and produce sounds, particles, display blocks, and more from stored data.

modules.name: Collection
modules.description: Work with collections in Minecraft datapacks. Map, filter, reduce, find, and transform elements with functional operations.

modules.name: Color
modules.description: Convert colors between RGB, hexadecimal, and integer formats in Minecraft datapacks. Useful for dynamic text colors and visual effects.

modules.name: Dump
modules.description: Debug Minecraft datapacks by printing scoreboard values, NBT data, and storage contents to chat with a simple, unified syntax.

modules.name: Environment
modules.description: Access biome and weather data in Minecraft datapacks. Get the current biome, check temperature, and detect rain or snow at any position.

modules.name: Generation
modules.description: Apply functions across world regions in Minecraft datapacks. Iterate over 2D/3D shapes with lag-free tick spreading and custom callbacks.

modules.name: Health
modules.description: Manage entity health in Minecraft datapacks: heal, damage, get/set values, modify max health, and assign lifetimes with death callbacks.

modules.name: Hitbox
modules.description: Get precise hitbox data for blocks and entities in Minecraft datapacks. Check collisions and access both collision and interaction shapes.

modules.name: ID
modules.description: Assign unique numeric IDs to entities in Minecraft datapacks. Create continuous ID chains and query entities by ID.

modules.name: Interaction
modules.description: Build in-world GUIs in Minecraft using Interaction entities. Bind click events, detect hover, and create interactive 3D menus.

modules.name: Link
modules.description: Link entities together in Minecraft datapacks with synchronized positions and rotations. Create complex multi-entity structures.

modules.name: Log
modules.description: Log messages to chat with severity levels (error, warn, info, debug). Filter by namespace and tags, and browse log history.

modules.name: Math
modules.description: Advanced math for Minecraft datapacks: trigonometry, exponentials, factorials, GCD, and float operations beyond vanilla commands.

modules.name: Move
modules.description: Control entity movement in Minecraft datapacks with velocity vectors and collision handling. Build physics-based projectiles and motion systems.

modules.name: Position
modules.description: Manage entity positions and rotations via scoreboard values in Minecraft datapacks. Set precise coordinates on any axis.

modules.name: Random
modules.description: Generate random numbers in Minecraft datapacks. Supports various distributions, weighted choices, and noise functions like Simplex and Fractal.

modules.name: Raycast
modules.description: Cast rays in Minecraft datapacks to detect block and entity hits. Voxel-accurate collision detection with customizable callbacks.

modules.name: Schedule
modules.description: Schedule commands in Minecraft datapacks with cancellation and context preservation. Remember which entity and location triggered it.

modules.name: Sidebar
modules.description: Create dynamic sidebars in Minecraft using scoreboards. Supports rich text formatting, alignment, and real-time content updates.

modules.name: Spline
modules.description: Create smooth curves from control points in Minecraft datapacks. Supports Bézier, Catmull-Rom, B-Spline, Hermite, and Linear interpolation.

modules.name: String
modules.description: Manipulate strings in Minecraft datapacks: concatenate, change case, search, replace, and count.

modules.name: Time
modules.description: Access the real-world system time from Minecraft datapacks. Get hours, minutes, and seconds for time-based events.

modules.name: Tree
modules.description: Pre-built tree structures for Minecraft: Birch, Cypress, Dark Oak with multiple variations.

modules.name: Vector
modules.description: Vector math for Minecraft datapacks: rotations, coordinate conversions, and 3D operations. Essential for physics and movement.

modules.name: View
modules.description: Execute commands based on where entities look in Minecraft. Detect aimed blocks, entities, and more.

modules.name: XP
modules.description: Manage player XP in Minecraft datapacks. Control the XP bar with precision, query status, and manipulate levels programmatically.
